overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit district of Night City. The player explores areas including a plaza with a holographic cherry blossom tree, enters the narrow Jig-Jig Street alley with dense signage, traverses an industrial walkway, and emerges onto a wide arterial road with futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with holographic tree and traditional gazebo

events.description: camera looks up at towering skyscrapers then returns to walking level

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza while observing the surrounding neon architecture and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the gazebo structure

entered.detail: large artificial tree with glowing pink cherry blossoms and falling petals
Japanese-style wooden pavilion with curved roof and red lanterns
tall futuristic building covered in illuminated signage and advertisements
rain-soaked ground reflecting neon lights in pink and blue hues

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza at night, dominated by a glowing holographic cherry blossom tree and a traditional Japanese gazebo. The camera pans up to admire the towering neon-lit skyscrapers before continuing forward through the wet, reflective pavement. Sparse pedestrians wander through the area as the player explores the cyberpunk environment.

events.description: passes under the JIG-JIG STREET archway into the enclosed alley

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the Jig-Jig Street alleyway, navigating past barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading JIG-JIG STREET with pink neon lettering
red and white striped barricades lining the sidewalk
glowing red heart-shaped neon sign on building facade
traditional round red lanterns hanging above the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open plaza into a narrow commercial alley, passing under the prominent JIG-JIG STREET archway. The environment becomes more enclosed with metal barriers lining the path and dense neon signage including heart symbols and red paper lanterns. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the camera enters the sheltered alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon alley with adult entertainment venues

events.description: turns right at an intersection within the alley system
lighting shifts to darker tones with more red and purple neon as entering deeper alley section

agents.ego_description: navigating through the winding alley, observing various storefronts and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person holding a pink umbrella walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with KARAOKE lettering in white
bright red neon sign reading SEX SHOP on building front
pink neon signage for adult entertainment venue
metal barrier railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Deep within the Jig-Jig Street alley, the player navigates a narrow corridor lined with dense neon signage for karaoke, sex shops, and peep shows. The environment is completely sheltered from the sky, illuminated by vivid red, pink, and blue neon. The camera turns through the winding alley, passing a pedestrian with a pink umbrella, while the lighting shifts to darker, more intimate tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial elevated walkway transitioning to lower streets

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto an industrial metal walkway with grated flooring
dialogue interaction prompt appears with an NPC near the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along an industrial metal walkway, approaching an NPC for dialogue interaction

notable_agents.action: character leaning against railing that the player interacts with

entered.detail: elevated walkway with metal grating floor and industrial railings
red neon sign indicating 24-hour service with Japanese characters
large metal pipes and ductwork running along building walls
graffiti-covered concrete blocks lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dense alley onto an industrial elevated walkway with metal grating floors and exposed pipes. The environment shifts to a more utilitarian aesthetic with concrete barriers and a 24-hour neon sign. The camera approaches an NPC leaning against the railing, triggering a dialogue interaction, before continuing along the walkway toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide arterial road with heavy neon signage and traffic

events.description: descends from walkway onto wide main street with vehicle traffic
camera looks up at towering skyscrapers with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a busy arterial road, observing the towering architecture and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving down the wet street with neon underglow

entered.detail: multi-lane street with yellow dividing lines and wet reflective surface
massive futuristic building covered in bright white and red neon advertisements
illuminated yellow cross symbol on a pole indicating medical facility
tall pole with traffic signals and a yellow plus sign

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide arterial road with moving vehicle traffic and massive towering skyscrapers covered in brilliant neon signage. The player walks along the sidewalk, passing a medical cross sign and traffic infrastructure, while futuristic cars drive past on the wet pavement. The camera looks up to admire the scale of the surrounding architecture before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open plaza into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched depths of a commercial alleyway. It begins beneath the glow of a holographic cherry blossom tree and a traditional gazebo, panning up toward towering skyscrapers before moving across wet, reflective pavement. As the camera advances, the open space narrows and shifts into the enclosed environment of Jig-Jig Street, passing under a prominent archway lined with metal barriers and red paper lanterns. The scene then tightens further into a sheltered corridor where the sky disappears, replaced by a dense canopy of vivid red, pink, and blue neon signs for karaoke and peep shows. Finally, the camera winds through the intimate, darker tones of the alley, passing a pedestrian with a pink umbrella as the surroundings become increasingly crowded and immersive.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a utilitarian industrial walkway into the overwhelming scale of a neon-lit metropolitan thoroughfare. It begins as the camera exits a dense alley onto an elevated path of metal grating and exposed pipes, passing concrete barriers and a glowing 24-hour sign. As the camera moves forward, it briefly pauses for a dialogue interaction with an NPC leaning against the railing before descending toward street level. The scene then opens onto a wide arterial road where the environment shifts to a vista of massive skyscrapers draped in brilliant neon signage and wet pavement reflecting the city lights. Finally, the camera glides along the sidewalk past medical signage and flowing vehicle traffic, tilting upward to capture the towering architecture of the district.
